items.title: Solana reclaims $80: Assessing if $18M whale long can spark SOL’s rally
items.whyYouShouldCare: A significant whale long position of $18M could influence SOL's price momentum, potentially attracting more liquidity and trader interest.

items.title: Solana stakers get a new way to force the next SOL inflation fight
items.whyYouShouldCare: New mechanisms for stakers to influence inflation could enhance SOL's utility and incentivize participation, impacting overall network stability.

items.title: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
items.whyYouShouldCare: Upcoming blockchain upgrades in 2026 may enhance Solana's performance and scalability, which could drive increased ecosystem usage and developer engagement.
